import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Unarchive Application"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/applications/{application_id}/unarchive"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Restore a previously archived application.

Clears `deleted_at` and makes the application visible to standard
queries again. Safe to call on an already-active application; it is a
no-op in that case.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
